dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: I need to know where the device is, now!
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent grabs the Market Vendor's arm

dialogue.speaker: Market Vendor
dialogue.line: I don't know what you're talking about!
dialogue.visual_cue: Market Vendor tries to pull away

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: Don't play dumb, I have reason to believe it's hidden somewhere in this market
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent scans the surrounding area

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: You're the one who's been seen lurking around here, what do you know?
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent corners the Suspicious Character

dialogue.speaker: Suspicious Character
dialogue.line: I don't know what you're talking about, I'm just a shopper
dialogue.visual_cue: Suspicious Character tries to hide something behind their back

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: Don't lie to me, I can see the fear in your eyes
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent takes a step closer to the Suspicious Character

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent discovers the explosive device

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: Now to disarm it... 5 minutes and counting
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent starts working on the device

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: Everyone get out, now! The device is going to detonate!
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent rushes out of the storage room, warning the crowd

dialogue.speaker: Market Vendors
dialogue.visual_cue: Market Vendors and Shoppers start to panic

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: Just get out, I'll take care of it!
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent rushes back to the storage room

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: Come on, come on... just a few more seconds
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent frantically works on the device

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent successfully disarms the device
